clauses.title: Term
clauses.text: This Agreement is effective January 1, 2025 and expires December 31, 2025, unless earlier terminated per Section 8.

clauses.title: Monthly Services Fee
clauses.text: Customer shall pay Vendor a monthly services fee not to exceed Fifteen Thousand U.S. Dollars ($15,000) per calendar month for analytics support.

clauses.title: Purchase Order Requirement
clauses.text: Vendor shall reference a valid Harbor purchase order number on every invoice submitted for payment.

clauses.title: Invoice Uniqueness
clauses.text: Vendor shall not submit duplicate invoices for the same billing period or invoice number.
